title: Magic Silver Shimmer Wall Backdrop 24pcs Square Sequin Panels - 30x30cm Reusable Glitter Photo Booth Backdrop (6FTx4FT)，for Wedding, Birthday, Baby Shower, Christmas Party Decoration
features: Effect:30x30 cm panel with double layer of polymer glitter to create a dynamic light refraction effect, which can maintain the gloss after multiple installations

Easy to Use: Each panel is pre-drilled, installation is a breeze, and the sequins of each tile are pre-installed. You only need to splice and install according to the actual size and shape you need, configure the shape you want and align the snaps.

Durability: Our glitter backdrop is made of durable polymer material, which can keep its luster for a long time. The backdrop can be used indoors or outdoors, and can be matched with other decorations to add brilliance to each of your parties and become your partner in setting the scene.

Usage: Glitter backdrop is perfect for birthday, wedding, engagement, anniversary, ceremony, graduation, Halloween, Christmas, bachelorette party, disco, stage background, bridal shower, New Year and other party decorations, add some charm to your home, these glitter wall backdrops are your perfect choice to make your party more attractive
Easy Clean Up: When the party is over, simply wipe the backdrop sequins or throw them away for easy cleanup, leaving you more time to spend with your guests.
description: Thank you for choosing us! -jianfa provides the perfect solution for your wedding, party, home or restaurant decoration. We light up every special day of yours with high-quality products. Party Background Decoration: Whether you want to arrange a shining background for your wedding, baby shower, birthday party, engagement party, Halloween, Christmas, New Year, etc., or just want to add a touch of charm to your home, these shining wall backgrounds are your ideal choice. Package contains: Magic Silver 30cm x 30cm 24pcs Material: Shining Wall Background; Features: Easy to clean, easy to use.
